reviews.review_description: I want to love this game, it checks a lot of boxes in regards to what I enjoy in VR Games. The game seems like an afterthought to the developers…soooo many glitches. My entire storage chest AND dog treat maker just up and disappeared. The saved games don’t load. The game even has the audacity to freeze the headset !This is beyond annoying, it’s not like the game is free.

I absolutely love the game and want to keep playing. However, I'm not sure how much more I can take of it glitching and crashing (more times than I can count). Characters have gone missing, making it impossible to complete quests. I can't go near the farm house without it crashing. I have had to restart because grandma and inventory went missing, only for it to happen again. If there were updates to fix the bugs I would give this 5 stars.

Seriously, WHAT in the world is wrong with this game?? Every single time I get on, it glitches by freezing and not unfreezing. I have to hard reset my headset to play anything again. I thought it bricked my headset once because everything went black and I couldn’t get it reset. 

This is an adorable game in every way but I can’t stand to play for 5 minutes and freeze. Not fun! Please Devs… can you possibly bug fix this?

Thanks
The game freezes up often.

I ignored this game for a while because of the reviews. The reviews were bad and 3.8 isn't very good. I should know by now not to listen to reviews. With the Christmas sale it was too cheap to pass up, although knowing what I know now I would have paid $30 for it.  I love it. Its like farmville in VR. I've been playing for days non-stop. Their is TONS of stuff to do, and tons to explore. The animals are adorable. Everytime I thought the game was coming to an end, there would be something new to explore, and more missions. Tons of different things to collect. Bugs, Butterflies, frogs, notes, furniture. It really is an amazing game. It looks great. It's up there in my top 5 now. I did come across a few bugs. The chickens act dumb sometimes about laying eggs. I would break down the perches and relay them and that would fix it. When I had a ton of animals, fruit trees and fruit bushes on the farm it started to freeze. I just started selling the extra animals and trees instead of letting them build up and that fixed the freezing problem. If I wanted to continue to play after completing that game it would be nice to be able to collect animals and trees. Besides those couple of things that can be worked around I had no problems with bugs/glitches. A great game with TONS of content. Thank you for an AWESOME game.

Really like the premise, and up until it got glitchy, a lot of fun. But restarting the game over and over isn't fun. I water the cabbages, but the game doesn't recognize this, so I can't go further. And this is the beginning of the game! Developers, you have a great idea, and I'm sure when you get everything working, it'll be great. I'll try to be patient until that occurs. But I can't play it until then.

The bad reviews are confusing i can only assume some major improvements happened after the reviews because there is absolutely no issue with this game its fun alot to do and a story to it i love it!!

Edit- CLEARLY i spoke to soon the storage box and animal treats/medicine machine has disappeared grandmas off on holiday or something cause she been MIA i read on a forum to buy a new box from trader but he doesn’t sell them so i have a sick animal a box full of meds with no way to get them or make more

I bought this game yesterday and it keeps freezing on me every 5 minutes. Is there any sort of patch or update for this game? i cant even get through 5 minutes of the game without havingbto start it all over again.

Hi, I love this game. It is so fun. Unfortunately, there’s a part of the game where the dog is supposed to find the cow. It will not find the cow. Also, I cannot get the Buffalo to move. How am I supposed to reunite the  family if they won’t walk I need help please.
The dog Wong go find the sheep

cool and fun game and cheap too . But i guess you get what you paid for. I really do enjoy this game but the glitches and bugs make it unbearable. But like i said i got what i paid for. I am deleting this game.I was really enjoying playing this game even through all the bugs and glitches but every time I go to play I have to keep remaking things over and over im done

I enjoyed the gameplay of this game. Most of the interactions work well, eventho they are not optimized for VR. I would give it a 5 but there are some gamebreaking glitches that need to be fixed. They mostly occur on save files, like not saving or loading right or mandatory Items like the storage box went missing after like 5hours of gameplay what made it impossible to continue as I was not able to access my collected Items or store new ones.

I am looking forward to playing this in its final form.  It’s super detailed, calm and peaceful, but at this stage super glitchy. I’ve restarted the game twice and it won’t register the twin goats.  I planted wildflowers all around my house and it caused major glitches The more I build the more it glitches.   I get crashes and have to start back over again. As of now I’m stopped and waiting for it to be updated.
I absolutely love this game. Raising farm animals, going on adventures, and building your own treehouse. It’s an amazing experience.

Its A LOT like harvest moon and I LOVE IT. My only issues is you can't turn off smooth movement. I get extremely motion sick on games that can't turn that off (unfortunately I only keep the ones that are super worth getting sick for). So I know this is early access but can the developers please make it so you can turn off smooth movement? Also an adjustment height in game would be great for those of us who are wheelchair bound. Ty! Looking forward to seeing where this game goes

developer_response.body:
Hi PhantomFeline86,
Thanks for playing! We are happy that you enjoy the experience!
You should be able to turn off smooth turn in the controls options. Additionally you can use the a teleport on your right stick, to avoid smooth movement completely. 
After re-centring the height is set the same regardless of your real-life position. You play a kid, and the default  height reflects it!

And hey, you can also visit our Discord if you wanna to talk about something in the game or else, we'll be happy to have you in there! https://discord.gg/k2p4vEQ7FN

reviews.review_title: In my vacation I am a 🧑‍🌾
reviews.review_description:
Don’t have this game very long, but there is so much to see, so much to do….
Talking to grandpa or grandma and see if you can help them to do stuff on the farm after they got hit by a hurricane.

If no new mission is available, just walk around, explore the environment, and new missions gonna pop up.

I love this game. Harvesting, petting, cleaning, crafting stuff,….

Check it out yourself.

If you like stardew Valley or Harvest Moon, this game will scratch that itch.  Only thing I would love to see is a currency system.  Then you could sell product.  Maybe similar to Farmville where you fill orders.  Although I am only a few hours into it so I am not sure what's to come.
Good job Devs 👏 keep up the good work.  I am looking forward to future updates👍

developer_response.body:
Hey, APEboys!

We're happy to hear that you're having a good time! Appreciate the feedback and that suggestion, it's forwarded it to the developers, we'll see, maybe something like this will appear in the future too 😎

High five! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
Edit to add that the bison dad isn't where he is supposed to be. I had to start a new game as had to factory reset my headset and game didn't save. Also the quest to catch more fish for Grampa is glitched as I've got the achievement for catching 30 off fish yet Grampa still tells me to keep catching five more. 

It reminds me alot of the harvest moon series. Which is great as I love those games i have them on other gaming devices. It's so cute. I don't have any issues with it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we appreciate the opinion! It is so great to hear that you're having fun with the game! High five!

reviews.review_description:
I'm glad we got this VR game. It makes a good impression. The graphics and sound are appealing, and for anyone who loves games like Stardew Valley or Harvest Moon, this is one of the few VR alternatives. 

What really bothers me,, is that there are only floating Hands and no full Body-IK, or at least footstep Sounds. This seriously breaks the immersion for me. 
I just feel like I'm floating silently through the game world, instead of walking over grass, wood or stone...

And I would really like to see such new and promising Titles utilize the full power of the Quest 3 from the start.
 
I really hope this promising game receives further updates because it could really become something unique on the Quest.

developer_response.body:
Hey Playsiane!

First of all, thanks for playing our game!

The absence of full Body-Ik was an early-on decision based on optimisation considerations. Nontheless we will explore if the addition of a body to our character is possible, thanks for the suggestion. Footsteps sounds you mention - we wanted to add them in one of the future updates so keep an eye on them, as we plan to expand Everdream Valley with whole lot of new cool things! 

Come to our Discord server if you wanna be up to date with everything or just chat with us directly => https://discord.gg/P8Esb3Rr4m 

Thank you for the support!

reviews.review_title: Good game but needs bugs fixing
reviews.review_description: I agree with the above comments that the cabbage quest does not work, the game does not recognise that I have planted the cabbages despite even harvesting them. I also agree that the axe disappears! I don’t know how to proceed in the game now as Grandma just keeps reminding me what I need to do the cabbages but I have done them! Any tips how to carry on please?

developer_response.body:
Hey, CuriousPuffin6899!

Thanks for the feedback and for highlighting the problems! 

About the cabbage quest - there's a known bug, where the intended place to plant the cabbage is not shown, how it normally should be. Next patch will fix it and you'll be able to plant them anywhere you want but for now it has to be done in the specific place. 

Hop in our Discord server, we'll help you with this and other issues!

https://discord.gg/P8Esb3Rr4m

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Game isn’t bad so far but the cabbage quest is broken with the planting for I tried many reloads but it still won’t work so hopefully you guys will fix the it. I’ll be happy to test more often and record more issues in the future as a tester here ☺️

developer_response.body:
Hi Crava878,
Thank you for giving a shot at Everdream!  
We are inspecting what could have happened with the cabbages during this quest.  You could join our discord channel, so we can inspect this issue with some feedback. 
https://discord.gg/k2p4vEQ7FN

reviews.review_description: When using the hammer it doesn't work till you hammer many times. When it rains, it should water the garden. Things disappear when you put them in the storage box at the barn if you don't realize it's full. Grandpa told me to fix a bridge and gave me nails, but no bridge will let me move on. I'm stuck where I am and I feel 20 dollars didn't get me very far.

developer_response.body:
Hi Saraloetz24,
Thanks for playing Everdream Valley and giving us feedback.
The first set of nails from Grandpa should allow you to fix the bridge to the Island (to the south-east). Much more adventures await you past this point!
We hope you will enjoy. 
Feel free to call us out in our discord channel if you need any more help!
https://discord.gg/k2p4vEQ7FN

reviews.review_description: The game is really cute but , the smooth turning makes me dizzy. Theres no way to turn it off. Also the hoe doesn’t work sometimes. But the aesthetics are pleasing. I’m going to have to get a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi GlamaldyE
Thanks for playing our game. Smooth turning can be switched OFF in the controls options.  In future updates we will turn it OFF by default.  We hope this will help you with your experience!

You can also visit our Discord and talk directly with us if you want! 
https://discord.gg/k2p4vEQ7FN

reviews.review_description:
Don’t expect much from this game , 
But it runs at a nice pace , 
Something to chill out to

developer_response.body:
Thanks for giving the game a try! We're glad you enjoyed the pace. While it may seem simple at first glance, there's actually over 50 hours of gameplay packed in — so if you ever feel like diving deeper, there’s a lot more to discover. Appreciate you playing!

Hop in our Discord server if you want!
https://discord.gg/k2p4vEQ7FN

reviews.review_description: Its a really nice game. But occasionally an item will get stuck in my inventory like the paint brush from the tree house or the chicken figurine.

developer_response.body:
Hello, Cobweb_Afternoon! 

Thank you for the opinion! Going through issues you've pointed out:

1. Primroses are sowed by finding a primeroses seedbag (usually near a field where they need to be sown) and then turning the seed bag upside down

2. You can only pick up full stacks of items, but then you can split them while holding by grabbing it with the other hand. This should enable you to get to holding 1 item

3. You need to hold the nail in one hand, overlap it with the hit point, and then smash it with the Hammer. If it doesn't work, please get in touch through our discord, and we will try to get through it together! => https://discord.gg/P8Esb3Rr4m


Have a good day, high five!

reviews.review_description: I love how cute this game is but I think it would feel a lot more realistic if there was voice acting involved.

developer_response.body:
Hey, Nybatgirl411! Thanks for the feedback!

Maybe not specifically voice acting, but we've already received signals that more sound effects would help players with the immersion so we'll thinking about putting them in the game in the near future!

reviews.review_description:
I love it so far, love the outfits 
Not too far in the game yet 
But I’m loving it so far

developer_response.body:
Hello looneytooney.2025,

Great to hear that! Hope you will have a lot of great time in the valley!
